calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Williams for Petitioner Helen Galatolo, Paul Melbostad for the Counsel General of Greece.
Mr. Williams stated the $10,000.00 distribution to Georgia Kapopoulos was paid in 1990 and they were unable to obtain a copy of the check from the bank.

Matter is taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Handa.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Continued To Feb-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Handelman for Helena Galatolo (Beneficiary). Paul Melbostad for and with Polyxeni Stefmidou (Counsel Genreal of Greece).

The Court stated that the moving party Mr. Williams was not present therefore, the parties were to submit there issues in the form of writing. All parties waived notice on the amended petition. The parties addressed the issues regarding the $10,000.00 distribution, the income tax certificate and the clerical error regarding the caption of the order. Ms. Stefmidou stated the corrected name of the hopsital (Beneficiary) for the record. The matter was continued to February 20, 2008. The parties are to present something in writing in regards to the issues raised in the examiner's notes and to submit the order with the corrected language. The parties will be notified if there presence is required on that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Jan-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Williams for Helen Galatolo (Executrix). Paul Melbostad for The Greek Counsel.

Mr. Williams requested a continuance to incorporate the settlement agreement into the final distribution of the estate. The matter was continued to January 16, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lee and Deputy Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-02-2007 Continued To Nov-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Continued To Aug-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Melbostad appearing for Kalamata Hospital. Counsel think case will settle but with Mr. Handelman's permission, he is asking the Court to set it for oral argument. Matter is continued to 8/24 at 9am for oral argument. If the case is not settle, Court will reset it.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Anderson.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Continued To Jun-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Oral Argument On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Continued To May-16-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Williams (Counsel for Helen Galatolo in her capacity as personal representative of the Estate); Albert Mandelman (Counsel for Helen Galatolo, individually); Paul Melbostad (Counsel for the Greek Consulate and Hospital beneficiary); Helen Galatolo (personal representative of the Estate - present in Court).

Counsel extensively discussed concerning the outstanding issues (reimbursement to the personal representative for administrative expenses/attorneys' fees, the need for a distribution). After rejecting the Court's invitation for mediation and further discussion of the need for an evidentiary hearing, the Court instructed counsel to brief the Court on all outstanding issues (primarily administrative costs and attorneys' fees) and submit the same on or before January 17, 2007. upon review of the same, the Court will advise counsel as to what issues, if any, will require evidentiary hearing.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Continued To Oct-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Albert Handleman and Tom Williams appearing for and with Helen Galatolo; Paul Melbostad appearing for the Greek Counsel.
The parties inform the court that no agreement has been reached. Mr Melbostad states that he did not get a response for the offer regarding the sale of the property. The court questions who is responsible for costs and estate taxes. The court informs the parties that Ms. Galatolo will not be removed at this time and ask that the paries define specific issues as well as amounts so that a desicion can be made. Ms Galatolo will file a petition for final distribution within 40 days. The matter is set for status on filing of final distribution to October 30, 2006. If filed no appearance is necessary.
Judicial officer: Commisioner Dorothy McMath; Reporter: Tina Paxton CSR#1558; Clerk:Rosie Noguera.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Of Administration

MINI MINUTES: Thomas J. Williams appearing for and with personal representative, Helen Galatolo. Paul Melbostad appearing for Greek Consulate. Mr. Williams is requesting for an additinal 90 days. Mr. Melbostad consents to the continuance. Court is also continuing the Order to show cause to the same date. Both matters are continued to 9/11. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Albert Handleman appearing for beneficiary Helen Galatolo, also present. Paul Melbostad appearing for the Greek Consulate. Discussed the representation of Ms. Galatolo. The court advised Ms. Galatolo to appear at the next hearing with a new attorney to represent her as a personal representative of the estate. The matter is continued to 6/5. Commissioner: Dorothy McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722; Clerk: Alison Agbay

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status. Written Status Report To Be Filed By 04/29/02. Appearance Will Be Required
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Paul Melbostad appearing for Consul General of Greece. He has spoken to Mr. Handlelman, counsel for Helen Galatols as beneficiary only. He thought an associate of the late counsel will take over the case to complete the administration. That counsel is not willing to take over the estate at this time. The executor has failed to file petition for final distributiion or status of administration. OSC to be issued to executor. Return date is 4/24/06. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
